CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value String);
SELECT id, toFloat32OrDefault(value, CAST('0', 'Float32')) AS converted_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, toFloat32OrDefault(value) AS converted_value, toFloat32OrDefault(value, CAST('100', 'Float32')) FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id < 5);
SELECT (SELECT toFloat32OrDefault(value) FROM test_table WHERE id = 3) + (SELECT toFloat32OrDefault('0b1010')) AS total_value;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS successful_conversions, COUNTIf(toFloat32OrDefault(value, CAST('0', 'Float32')) = 0) AS failed_conversions FROM test_table;
SELECT t.id, IF(toFloat32OrDefault(t.value) IS NULL, 'Conversion Failed', 'Conversion Success') AS conversion_status FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table) AS t;
SELECT value, toFloat32OrDefault(value) AS float_value, toFloat32OrDefault(value, CAST('1.0', 'Float32')) AS defaulted_value FROM default_test;
WITH (SELECT AVG(toFloat32OrDefault(value, '5.0')) FROM test_table) AS avg_value SELECT id, value, avg_value FROM test_table;
